parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT call_count FROM aerys_model_usage WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE AND model = 'opus'), 0) AS count
INSERT INTO aerys_model_usage (date, model, call_count) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE, 'opus', 1) ON CONFLICT (date, model) DO UPDATE SET call_count = aerys_model_usage.call_count + 1
